title: Ronan Michael
extract:
Ronan Michael (born 3 July 2000) is an Irish professional rugby league footballer who plays as a prop for the Innisfail Leprachauns in the Cairns District Rugby League and Ireland at international level.
He previously played for the Huddersfield Giants in the Super League, and spent time on loan from Huddersfield at Whitehaven, York and the Swinton Lions.
